goal: Fix the off-by-one bug in stats.py where mean() divides by len(numbers)+1 instead of len(numbers), causing all downstream functions (variance, stdev, normalize) to produce incorrect results and all tests to fail.
scope: stats.py — fix the denominator in the mean() function from len(numbers)+1 to len(numbers)
out_of_scope: Any refactoring or feature additions beyond the single bug fix

acceptance_criteria.check: Does stats.py compute the arithmetic mean by dividing by len(numbers) (not len(numbers)+1)?
